title: rosa gallica var. velutiniflora
intro: Rosa gallica var. velutiniflora, also known as the soft-leaved French rose, is a fragrant, climbing rose species native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, due to its high content of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Rosa gallica var. velutiniflora include reducing fever, treating rheumatic pain, and aiding in wound healing. Rosa gallica var. velutiniflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
